summary.zh-CN: 本版本改进聊天内容呈现、文件与目录引用、上下文压缩稳定性、桌面端更新检查和 Marketplace 技能体验。
summary.en-US: This release improves chat rendering, file and directory references, context compaction reliability, desktop update checks, and Marketplace skills.

title.zh-CN: 文件、目录和应用标签更像可操作链接
title.en-US: File, directory, and app tokens behave more like actionable links

body.zh-CN: 聊天中的文件和目录引用支持逐层进入目录和项目全范围搜索，发送后的标签会以更紧凑的链接样式呈现。
body.en-US: File and directory references support directory navigation and project-wide search, and sent tokens render as compact links.

title.zh-CN: 实验性 UI 注入口

body.zh-CN: 高级用户和社区工具可以通过 NextClaw 数据目录中的 ui-inject.js 执行自定义界面脚本。
body.en-US: Advanced users and community tools can run custom interface scripts through ui-inject.js in the NextClaw data directory.

body.zh-CN: Marketplace 可以分发可复用的界面皮肤和资源，方便把自定义体验沉淀为技能。
body.en-US: Marketplace can distribute reusable interface skins and resources, making custom experiences reusable as skills.

title.zh-CN: HTML 和 Mermaid 呈现更自然
title.en-US: HTML and Mermaid rendering feel more natural

body.zh-CN: HTML 预览去掉多余边框并按内容调整高度；Mermaid 在历史和流式回复中减少源码闪现并保留稳定画面。
body.en-US: HTML previews remove extra chrome and resize with content; Mermaid reduces source-code flashes and keeps a stable frame during updates.

title.zh-CN: 桌面端运行期间继续检查更新
title.en-US: Desktop checks for updates while running

body.zh-CN: 桌面端会在应用运行期间判断是否需要检查更新，并在窗口重新获得焦点或系统恢复后补查。
body.en-US: The desktop app checks whether update polling is needed while running, and catches up after focus or system-resume events.

body.zh-CN: 最近更新排序、目录刷新、总数表达和历史安装条目兼容性更稳定。
body.en-US: Recent-update sorting, catalog refresh, total counts, and older install records are more reliable.

title.zh-CN: 上下文压缩不再留下半完成状态
title.en-US: Context compaction no longer leaves half-finished state

body.zh-CN: 压缩始终沿用当前会话所选模型，失败后切换到可用模型即可继续会话。
body.en-US: Compaction keeps using the selected session model, and sessions can continue after switching to an available model.

body.zh-CN: 窄屏布局从会话列表进入已有会话时，历史消息不再偶尔显示为空。
body.en-US: Opening an existing session from the session list on narrow screens no longer occasionally shows an empty history.

body.zh-CN: 本版本不需要手动迁移。

title.zh-CN: 实验性 UI 注入口默认不影响普通用户
title.en-US: Experimental UI injection does not affect ordinary users by default

body.zh-CN: 不需要自定义界面的用户可以忽略 ui-inject.js；该能力不提供安全性、DOM 稳定性或跨版本兼容保证。
body.en-US: Users who do not customize the UI can ignore ui-inject.js; this capability does not promise security, DOM stability, or cross-version compatibility.
